template_meta.name: webnovel-studio-import-template
notes: The layers object is used directly by project import.
post_import blocks are optional and can be applied later via each API.

data.geography: Mountain fortresses, river plains, and ruined border cities define the landscape.

cities.name: Haneul Fortress
cities.description: A military city guarding the northern pass.

cities.name: Miryang Port
cities.description: A smuggling hub where factions collide.

landmarks.name: Silent Archive
landmarks.description: A forbidden library sealed by decree.

data.mapDescription: North is mountainous and militarized, south is maritime and lawless.

data.powerSystem: Body mechanics and disciplined blade forms; no fantasy aura techniques.
data.powerSource: Breath control, tendon strength, timing, and battlefield reading.
data.powerLimits: Injury and stamina strictly limit performance in prolonged conflict.
rules: Story bible facts override all prior model knowledge.
Continuity with previous episodes is mandatory.

conflicts: The protagonist must work with a bureau he distrusts.
A missing ledger can expose both nobles and rebels.
tensions: Every ally may be an informant.
plotSeeds: A burned insignia appears at every major murder scene.
The mentor refuses to explain the old campaign at Blood Cliff.

data.name: Lee Cheongun
data.personality: Calm, dry, strategic, and stubborn under pressure.
data.coreNarrative: He investigates the death of his brother while serving the state that betrayed him.
data.fatalWeakness: Cannot walk away from personal debt.
data.anxietyConditions: Freeze response when hearing old war drums.
goals: Find the real killer behind the bureau-sanctioned report.
Survive political games without losing agency.
data.ultimateGoal: Reveal the hidden chain of command behind the Blood Cliff purge.
abilities: Tracking by residue and footprint pattern
data.appearance: Lean build, old forearm scar, restrained expression, weathered coat.
data.speechPattern: Short lines, ironic edge, no emotional overexposure.

data.name: Chief Inspector Han Myeong
data.origin: Rose from provincial clerk to central command through crisis handling.
data.coreNarrative: He preserves order by controlling truth, not by seeking it.
data.surfaceGoal: Protect state stability by suppressing panic.
data.ultimateGoal: Consolidate intelligence power under his private chain of loyalty.
data.motivation: Believes public truth causes civil collapse.
data.worldMadeMe: He saw reformists trigger famine through idealism.
data.relationship: Mentor figure in public, strategic opponent in private.
data.appearance: Clean uniform, immaculate gloves, unreadable eyes.

data.name: Seo Yerin
data.personality: Fast-thinking analyst who masks fear with humor.
data.origin: Archive apprentice from the old capital
data.appearance: Ink-stained fingers, practical robe, sharp gaze.

data.name: Master Gwon
goals: Keep the protagonist alive long enough to choose his own truth

data.name: Jang Dojin
data.personality: Ambitious officer obsessed with merit and recognition.
goals: Outperform the protagonist in every operation

data.name: Hwa Rin
data.personality: Composed field doctor with strict moral boundaries.
goals: Prevent unnecessary casualties while staying independent
data.speechPattern: Gentle but firm, no dramatic flourish.

data.name: Baek Chil
goals: Earn enough leverage to free his sister from debt bondage

data.surface: Who burned the bureau witness registry before the hearing?
data.truth: The registry burn was ordered to erase records tied to Blood Cliff survivors.
hints: A rare wax seal appears in two unrelated crime scenes.
A dead witness had military-grade boot residue on his sleeve.
middleTwists: The mentor is listed as dead in official records from 12 years ago.
The rival unknowingly carries a cipher key fragment.
mysteries: Why does the chief inspector protect one smuggler route?
Who keeps moving sealed files out of the archive at dawn?
foreshadowing: Every ledger page missing from chapter one links to one forgotten unit.
A child rhyme in the slums encodes military dispatch timings.

story_bible_synopses.title: Ash on the Stone
story_bible_synopses.synopsis: The protagonist wakes in a corpse field operation zone and is forced into a mercy kill that becomes his first moral fracture.
goals: Establish protagonist tone and survival context
Introduce the old mentor and core tension
key_events: First training cue with non-fantasy blade logic
foreshadowing: Unknown insignia on a dead officer's belt
story_bible_synopses.ending_image: The training stick cuts air in a bent line.
story_bible_synopses.forbidden: No identity reveal of chief inspector's true objective
story_bible_synopses.scene_beats: Wake-up, corpse work, mercy kill, cleansing scene, first blade principle.

story_bible_synopses.title: Ledger Dust
story_bible_synopses.synopsis: The team traces residue from burned pages to a dock route tied to bureau logistics.
goals: Expand conspiracy scope without full reveal
Strengthen rivalry and fragile alliance dynamics
foreshadowing: Stamped crate with erased military prefix
story_bible_synopses.ending_image: A sealed crate opens to reveal witness tags.
story_bible_synopses.forbidden: No direct confession by main antagonist
story_bible_synopses.scene_beats: Port entry, stakeout, clash with rival, crate reveal cliffhanger.

objectives: Find source of witness registry burn
timeline_events.notes: Do not reveal final command chain before episode 10.

writing_memories.preference_summary: Avoid excessive staccato sentence chains. Keep paragraph flow natural.
avoid_patterns: One-line paragraphs repeated without semantic grouping
Direct emotional exposition without physical cues
favor_patterns: Connected sentence rhythm with clear action progression

style_dna.proseStyle: Cold, lean, immersive hardboiled prose with restrained emotion.
style_dna.rhythmPattern: Mix medium-long narrative lines with occasional short impact lines.
style_dna.dialogueStyle: Concise dialogue with subtext and tactical intent.
style_dna.emotionExpression: Express emotion through action, breath, body tension, and silence.
style_dna.sceneTransition: Use sensory anchors and motion continuity for transitions.
style_dna.actionDescription: Anatomy and physics grounded combat, no fantasy aura effects.

manual_hooks.summary: Optional manual hook after project creation
